raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was charged {$110.00} by XXXX for a subscription I had canceled during the free trial period. Despite canceling, XXXX failed to send a cancellation confirmation and later canceled my account without notifying me. I can no longer log in to my XXXX  account using my email address ( XXXX ), which means I have no access to the services I was charged for. 

I have made multiple attempts to contact XXXX through their support system, but they have only provided automated responses and no resolution. I also filed a dispute with my bank, Citi, but they closed the case, stating I need proof of cancellation from XXXX. However, XXXX has not responded to my inquiries or provided evidence of any activity on my account. 

XXXX actionscharging me for a service while denying accessconstitute unfair billing practices. I am requesting a full refund of {$110.00} for the subscription I can not use.
